primary_metric: design-tokens/tokens.json generates committed, drift-gated Android artifacts (FitMeDesignTokens.kt + colors.xml + dimens.xml); `npm run tokens:android:check` passes and fails on drift (T1)
success_metrics: Pipeline runs: `npm run tokens:android` produces 3 artifacts with 0 errors (T1, measured)
Determinism: two consecutive builds are byte-identical (T1, verified via diff)
Drift gate: `npm run tokens:android:check` exits 0 in-sync and non-zero on any tokens.json edit (T1, verified by mutate-then-revert)
Coverage: 49 colors + 34 dimens + 8 Compose objects generated from the 108-token source; 0 duplicate resource names (T1, measured)
kill_criteria: Generated Kotlin does not compile in a real Android module once an app exists — the hand-rolled format produced invalid symbols/types
Drift gate produces false positives on a clean tree (e.g. non-determinism from map ordering) — operators learn to ignore it
Style Dictionary v6 removes the v5 format API the config depends on — silent build break
kill_criteria_resolution: K1 not yet evaluable — no Android app/toolchain exists in-repo (AND-3 deferred indefinitely); output validated structurally (well-formed Kotlin objects, unique resource names, valid Dp/Color/Float types) but not compiled. K2 resolved: determinism verified byte-identical across builds; drift gate green on clean tree. K3 future-watch: config hand-rolls formats and depends on no built-in transform group, minimizing version-bump surface; reviewed at quarterly audit + on any style-dictionary major bump.
dispatch_pattern: single-session implement (config + scripts + generated artifacts + docs), modeled on the iOS sd.config.mjs pipeline
scope_summary: Make the Android design-system token pipeline real (AND-1). Replace the non-functional design-tokens/config-android.json (v3-era, referenced non-existent size/compose/dp+sp transforms) with sd.config.android.mjs (Style Dictionary v5, ESM, hand-rolled Compose + XML formats mirroring the iOS sd.config.mjs). Generate + commit android/FitMeDesignTokens.kt + android/res/values/{colors,dimens}.xml from design-tokens/tokens.json. Add `npm run tokens:android` + `tokens:android:check` drift gate (scripts/check-tokens-android.js). Refresh android-token-mapping.md + android-adaptation.md to reflect the working pipeline (closes the deferred AND-2 refresh framing). Out of scope: native Android app code / Gradle / Compose screens (AND-3, deferred indefinitely, re-eval 2027-05-26); compiling the generated Kotlin (no Android toolchain in-repo). The Makefile `tokens-android-check` + verify-local wiring ships separately (infra-glob, isolated worktree).

tasks.description: sd.config.android.mjs — SD v5 ESM config: custom Compose + XML formats, hex/rgba→ARGB color conversion, px→dp, semantic-typography reference comment
scripts/check-tokens-android.js — regenerate + date-stripped diff drift gate (execFileSync, no shell), mirrors check-tokens.js
Generate + commit android/FitMeDesignTokens.kt + android/res/values/{colors,dimens}.xml; verify determinism + uniqueness + drift gate
Refresh android-token-mapping.md (§0a AND-1 SHIPPED) + android-adaptation.md (generated token layer); fix stale Focus.ring reference
Makefile `tokens-android-check` target + verify-local wiring (infra-glob — isolated worktree, separate PR)

implementation.notes: Enhancement of android-design-system. Research (ground-truth Explore pass) + approved plan preceded implementation. Single-session: config + scripts + generated artifacts + docs.

complete.notes: T1-T6 done + verified (deterministic, drift-gated, 0 dup names). T7 Makefile gate ships separately (isolated worktree). fitme-story showcase MDX + related_prs backfilled post-merge via close-feature.
